titleStmt.title: SII 27.85: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 85. (A.R. No. 498 of 1928-29.) NĪLĀVARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 8) set up in the prākāra of Mahishāsuramardini temple. (second side.)
This record is dated Śaka 1330, Sarvajit, Āśvayuja ba. 1 Sunday corresponding regularly to 1407 A.D., September 18. The Śaka year was current.

It registers a grant of provisions made for the offerings to goddess Durgādēvī of Nīruvāra by Śivadāsidēva-ayagaḷ, with the consent of the sixteen of the village, Jagattu-300, Pādāḷi and Sūlapāṇi. Bāchaṇṇa-voḍeya, under whose command Śivadāsidēva was in-charge of the administration of that village, was governing Bārakūru-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 76 above.
div.p:
© śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . svastiśrī jayā
© bhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1330 neya vartamāna sarvajitu saṁvacharada
Āsvayija ba 1 Ā śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra pratā
pa dēvarāya mahārāyaru sukharājyaṁ geyuva kāladalu Ā dē
va rāyara nirūpadiṁ bācaṁṇa Oḍeyaru bārakura rājyavanu
pratipālisutirddhalli bācaṁṇa Oḍeyara nirūpadiṁ sivadāsi
dēva Āyagaḷu nīruvārada Ādhikārava māḍuvalli Ā sivadāsidēva Ā
yagaḷū niruvāradagrāma hadināṟu jagattuṁ munūṟu pādā
ḷi sūlapāṇi sahitavāgi Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasida silaśāsanada kramave
taṁdare niruvārada durggādēviyara nayivēdyakke This is engraved in continuation of No. 76 above.
muṁde yisthānakke Ārasūgrāma hadināṟū pā
dāḷi sēnabōva sahitavāgi muṁdakke Ākkiya nikkuvudakke mā
ḍida kaḷagadavaru Uṁṇigelliya maga Uḷatraṁnage hāneThis is engraved in continuation of No. 76 above.
Avana taṁma kriṣṇana maga sūlapāṇige hāse 1 kuḍute 7 U
layamaga kriṣṇaṁge Akkimāna 2 yi baThis line is engraved between lines 14 and 16 in smaller siśe.
rada śāsanakke grāma hadināṟaṟoḷage Ārobbaru tappidare Āra
siṁge ga 120 hoṁnu tappu Ā canasappa seṭṭi maledēvanige haṁnera
ḍu muḍi bhattavanū tettu yi śāsana pramāṇaṁge niluvaru Eṁdu
Ātanū grāma hadināṟū Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barasida śilāśāsana yi
tappudake Arasina suhastadoppa . triyaṁbaka dēvaru . grāma
hadināṟaṟa suhastadoppa jagatisutanavoppa śrī durggādēvi
kaṁ śrī śrī śrī .
2. About 3 lines after this seen to have been erased.
Digital edition of SII 27.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
